message:
chore(beads): close franken_networkx-73lca audit bead (br-73lca)

br update/close/show by-id were hitting a spurious "issue not found"
CLI bug (list/search worked, direct-id lookups didn't). Bead was
legitimately completed this session so flipping via the JSONL and
resyncing the DB rather than fighting the CLI:

  58 real test failures -> 0 across 22 commits.
  20/20 consecutive full-suite runs green
    (3876 passed, 0 failed, 1 xfailed oscillator).
  347 lines of dead Python code removed.
  Coverage matrix: NX_DELEGATED 19 -> 0 (architectural gate closed).

The xfail-strict=False residual is the C_4 Alon-Boppana
boundary flake in sp.sparse.linalg.eigsh (upstream-nx inherits
it); not a fnx defect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -191,7 +191,7 @@
 {"id":"franken_networkx-6zuf","title":"parity: conversion live views should preserve adjacency() mapping contract","description":"The top-level to_undirected() and to_directed() live views currently expose a broken adjacency() iterator: consumers receive neighbor lists rather than dict-like neighbor mappings, and simple iteration code that expects .items() fails. Match NetworkX's adjacency() contract on conversion views so each yielded neighbor structure behaves like the upstream atlas/mapping objects.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T07:39:14.370055367Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T22:21:41.344684838Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T22:21:41.342608678Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"franken_networkx-727o","title":"[E10] Adversarial decode-drill: success bounds and fail-closed beyond","description":"**Track:** E. **Priority:** P2. **Type:** feature.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-09T00:23:21.753437351Z","updated_at":"2026-04-09T00:24:13.858676462Z","closed_at":"2026-04-09T00:24:13.858359852Z","close_reason":"duplicate from dry-run double-create","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

-{"id":"franken_networkx-73lca","title":"[SOLO-AUDIT] 58 real test failures across the Python suite","description":"Surfaced during a solo repo-health audit on 2026-04-23 while cod agents are offline on Codex usage limit. The bv backlog was reported empty (989/989 closed) but the full Python test suite surfaces 58 real failures spanning several categories.

# Top buckets

- test_graph_metrics_expansion (13): TestBoundaryExpansion / TestNodeExpansion / TestMixingExpansion / TestNonEdges / TestAllPairsDijkstra — mostly return-shape / ordering divergences from upstream.
- test_component_algorithms (7): TestAttractingComponents / TestIsAttractingComponent — likely missing or incorrect contract for directed attracting-components family.
- test_parity_comprehensive (6): TestCompleteToChordalGraphParity + test_is_kl_connected (FIXED in 44d8019) + TestGenerators::test_complete_to_chordal.
- test_multigraph_algorithms (5): test_bridges (len on generator), test_clustering / test_transitivity, weighted shortest-path min-parallel-edge.
- test_coverage_gaps (4): test_public_coverage_has_no_networkx_delegated_exports + sibling matrix / fallback checks.
- test_graph_predicates (3): is_graphical, non_randomness, is_regular_expander — each different signature.
- test_e2e_smoke (3): multigraph/multidigraph_extended_surface, test_euler.
- test_dag_additional (3): TestAntichains — all three methods (chain, empty, raises_on_undirected).
- test_connectivity (3): TestConnectivity::test_all_node_cuts_* — flow-func / explicit-k variants.
- test_clustering_cliques (3): TestAllTrianglesParity mismatches with nx kwargs.
- Misc: graph_utilities (copy/to_undirected as_view on Multi*), native_replacements (complete_to_chordal), all_shortest_paths_method (bellman_ford_undirected_raises).

# Recommended follow-up

Assign to the returning cod swarm in batches:
- One bead per test file or tight category (10 beads roughly).
- Keep each fix focused and add a regression gate to lock the contract.

Verified via rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_franken_networkx_cc cargo test is unnecessary — these are Python-surface tests. Re-run via:
